title: kiokuMemoryRecord
description: Frontmatter schema for any Markdown memory file in the kioku vault. Validated by lib/vault.py on read and write.

id.description: Globally unique ID. Format: <TYPE_PREFIX>-YYYY-MM-DD-<kebab-slug>. Examples: DEC-2026-05-19-name-kioku, SESSION-2026-05-19-cache-impl, PAT-2026-04-12-bash-strict-mode.

type.description: Memory entry type. Determines which directory the file lives in and which retrieval scoring weights apply.

status.description: Lifecycle status. 'deprecated' is set when superseded by another entry; 'archived' is set by the decay cron.

created_at.description: When kioku first ingested this record (ingestion_time in bi-temporal terms).

event_at.description: When the fact described was true (event_time). For decisions, the date the decision was made. For sessions, the session start time.

last_accessed.description: Most recent injection or read. Updated by lib/retrieve.py.

access_count.description: Cumulative injection count. Feeds the access_freq scoring axis (Generative Agents, arxiv 2304.03442).

importance.description: LLM-rated importance 0-1. Set by the consolidation cron; user can override by hand.

source.description: Provenance. Used by lib/trust.py to set the trust attribute on injection.

trust.description: Trust level for injection. 'low' is excluded from default injection (memory poisoning defense, MINJA arxiv 2503.03704).

project.description: Project slug if this memory is project-scoped, null for cross-project (global) memory.

tags.description: Free-form tags. Used for facet filtering in retrieval.

supersedes.description: ID of the memory this entry replaces. Used by the conflict-resolution cron.

deprecated_by.description: ID of the memory that has replaced this one. When non-null, this entry is excluded from default injection.

pinned.description: If true, this memory is force-injected on every SessionStart regardless of retrieval score.

files_touched.description: Number of files modified during the session (type=session only).

next_action.description: Slug of the next action to resume on (type=session only).

domain.description: Domain a pattern applies to (type=pattern only).
